description: Fivetran SDK Connector Marketplace — community-built connectors with zero-config setup

connectors.description: Sync graph and relational data from your Neo4j database to any Fivetran-supported destination. Supports incremental syncs using timestamp-based cursors.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community

connectors.description: Sync analytical data from your ClickHouse OLAP database. Optimized for high-volume columnar data extraction.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community

connectors.description: Sync enterprise data from SAP HANA in-memory database. Supports incremental replication of SAP HANA tables.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community

connectors.description: Sync learning analytics from DataCamp — track team progress, course completions, and skill development.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community

connectors.description: Sync real-time analytics data from Apache Druid for high-performance event-driven pipelines.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community

connectors.description: Sync JSON document data from Couchbase Capella cloud database to your destination.
connectors.author: Fivetran Community
